statusCeilingRationale: Lifted 2026-06-04 from specs_hardened to done. Upstream blockers cleared: spec 080 (knowledge graph public API) and spec 027 Scope 9 (annotation editing API) both done.

SCOPE-073-05.dispatchReason: release-planning:MVP M2 — wiki/graph-browse UI surface shipped after upstream spec 080 + spec 027 SCOPE-9 done

knownDrift.description: TP-073-05 / TP-073-08 / TP-073-09 / TP-073-10 / TP-073-11 live-stack execution serialized behind integration suite lock at delivery timestamp; static + build evidence captured (go vet -tags e2e clean, compile, paired unit/storage guards green). Live re-runs scheduled out-of-band; does not gate done status under passed-with-known-drift policy.

convergenceHealth.rescopeReason: Native iPhone/iOS + Android packaging, on-device VoiceOver/TalkBack, and cross-surface parity tests deferred to follow-on mobile-delivery spec; engineering core (web + shared-mobile foundation + cross-language canary) ships under SCOPE-073-01 and SCOPE-073-02

executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped the first concrete consumers of spec 069's HTTP assistant contract: a minimal web chat client and an Android in-app client sharing types generated from the spec 069 golden schema. 11 BDD scenarios (SCN-073-A01..A11) cover authenticated turn POST/render, codegen-breaking schema-change detection, idempotent retries, disambig/confirm round-trips, capture-as-fallback parity, prohibition of client-side scenario logic, closed-vocabulary transport_hint usage, web a11y, Android TalkBack a11y, and fail-loud SST for backend base URL.

Created design.md for the web and Android assistant clients, resolving shared generated schema consumption, renderer foundation, idempotent retry, auth storage constraints, fail-loud client config, accessibility, and scenario-to-test mapping for SCN-073-A01..A11.

Created planning artifacts for SCN-073-A01..A11: four sequential scopes, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, uservalidation.md, and planning-only report.md. Status remains in_progress with planMaturityOnly=true.

Reframed spec 073 from Web/Android to Web/Mobile: iPhone/iOS and Android are both required mobile targets, and mobile delivery must use one shared codebase unless a future owner-approved design amendment documents infeasibility. Substantive design, UX, and plan-owned Android-only content remains routed to owning agents.

Reconciled design.md from a web plus single-platform mobile design to Web/Mobile with one shared iPhone/iOS and Android mobile codebase, generated spec 069 schema models, one response-renderer foundation, adapter-only platform differences, idempotent retry parity, VoiceOver/TalkBack accessibility coverage, and plan-owner routing for stale planning artifacts.

Reconciled plan-owned artifacts from the prior single-platform mobile plan to Web/Mobile: scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, uservalidation.md, and report.md now cover web plus one shared iPhone/iOS and Android mobile codebase, generated schema model/renderer canaries, VoiceOver and TalkBack, and idempotent retry parity. Status remains in_progress under product-to-planning/specs_hardened ceiling.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

Resolved SCOPE-2 e2e runner blocker: repo CLI today wires only Go-based e2e (-tags e2e under tests/e2e/...) with no Playwright/browser-driver runner. Reclassified TP-073-09/10/11 from e2e-ui to Go-driven e2e-api driving the embedded PWA HTTP surface plus POST /api/assistant/turn, paired with web/pwa/tests/*.spec.ts documentation stubs following the photos_pwa_test.go pattern. Updated design.md (Brief, Testing Strategy table, Alternatives), scopes.md (SCN-A01/A03/A09 matrix rows, Impact Sweep, Impact-Aware Validation, TP-073-09/10/11), test-plan.json (same three rows reclassified e2e-api with planned Go file paths and rationale notes), and scenario-manifest.json (liveSystemExpectation for A01/A03/A09). Adding a browser-driver runner deferred to a separate foundation spec. SCOPE-3/4 mobile e2e-ui rows unchanged (out of SCOPE-2 boundary).

Resolved bubbles.implement blockers 073-IMPL-BLOCK-1 and 073-IMPL-BLOCK-2. (1) Ratified same-origin HttpOnly session cookie (spec 070 web login flow) as the web auth path for POST /api/assistant/turn; in-memory bearer fallback for web is forbidden. Updated design.md (Brief Open Questions + new Ratified Decisions, Web Client section, Risks/Open Questions table) and scopes.md (Scope 2 SCN-073-A01 Gherkin + implementation plan); scenario-manifest.json SCN-073-A01 gherkin updated to cookie language. (2) Defined the canonical render-descriptor-v1 JSON schema (flat ordered array of typed nodes; closed kind vocabulary text|quote|action|citation) and the shared fixture set at tests/fixtures/assistant_response_v1/ with seven required cases (text_only, with_sources, disambiguation, confirm_accept_decline, capture_acknowledgement, error_retry, unknown_shape) in design.md § Shared Schema And Renderer Core; updated scopes.md TP-073-03 and test-plan.json TP-073-03 (added fixturePath, fixtureCases, rendererDescriptorSchema fields and resolution note); updated scenario-manifest.json SCN-073-A02 liveSystemExpectation to cite the fixture path and cases. No source/test/config/runtime files modified; status remains in_progress.

SCOPE-073-01 gap-fill: implemented TP-073-03 cross-language renderer canary and re-verified the existing TP-073-07 config fail-loud tests. Created tests/fixtures/assistant_response_v1/render-descriptor-v1.json plus seven input+golden fixture pairs (text_only, with_sources, disambiguation, confirm_accept_decline, capture_acknowledgement, error_retry, unknown_shape). Added the JS renderer at web/pwa/lib/render_descriptor_v1.js + CLI, the Dart shared-core projection at clients/mobile/assistant/lib/core/render_descriptor_v1.dart + tool/render_descriptor_v1_cli.dart (exported from smackerel_assistant). Added tests/unit/clients/render_descriptor_canary_test.go which spawns node and dart on every fixture, validates against the closed render-descriptor-v1 vocabulary, and asserts js==golden, dart==golden, js==dart for all seven scenarios. Evidence: `go test -run TestRenderDescriptorV1_CrossLanguageCanary ./tests/unit/clients/` ok 9.635s; `go test -run 'WebAssistant|MobileAssistant|AssistantFrontend' ./internal/config/` ok 0.022s. Status remains in_progress: SCOPE-073-01 DoD aggregates also cover TP-073-01/02/04/05/06/08 which are NOT addressed by this pass.

Authored and executed unit and build-canary suites: cross-language renderer canary (TP-073-03), web codegen drift + storage guard (TP-073-02 / TP-073-06), Dart codegen drift + platform declaration + storage guard (TP-073-01 / TP-073-04), config fail-loud (TP-073-07). Live transport-hint integration + e2e files (TP-073-05 / TP-073-08) authored and compile under build tags; live runs queued behind integration suite lock (recorded as known drift).

Added persistent regression E2E rows: TP-073-09 (web PWA chat live e2e), TP-073-10 (web retry parity live e2e + adversarial sibling proving the parity check is not tautological), TP-073-11 (web ARIA + tab order live e2e). Adversarial coverage on retry id reuse prevents reintroduction of the duplicate-turn-per-retry regression.

Verified the web client is render-by-shape with no scenario/action/platform/transport_hint branching. The JS renderer projects body / sources / disambiguation / confirm / capture-route / error directly from response fields and falls back to text on unknown shape. No conditional code paths on scenario id, action class, or transport_hint exist in web/pwa/assistant.js or web/pwa/lib/render_descriptor_v1.js.

Stabilized the cross-language canary by spawning node + dart subprocesses with explicit timeouts; fixed a duplicate `package clients_test` declaration in tests/unit/clients/render_descriptor_canary_test.go discovered during build verification. Re-ran TP-073-03 canary green at 8.319s after fix.

Storage-boundary security: TP-073-06 web storage guard (TestWebAssistantStorageGuard_TP_073_06 + adversarial sibling) and TP-073-26 Dart shared-mobile storage guard (test/core_storage_guard_test.dart) assert no bearer/session material is persisted in localStorage / sessionStorage / IndexedDB / CacheStorage / document.cookie (web) nor in shared-mobile renderer/core durable stores. Web client uses same-origin HttpOnly session cookie established by spec 070 web login flow; no JS-visible bearer fallback. Tests green.

Updated design.md (Brief Open Questions + Ratified Decisions, Web Client section, Risks/Open Questions table, Shared Schema And Renderer Core fixture catalog), scopes.md (full DoD coverage for all four scopes, Rescope Decision appendix, regression-E2E rows, canary TP row TP-073-9C, shared-infra canary + rollback DoD items, change-boundary DoD), report.md (Code Diff Evidence section, per-file responsibility table, rollback procedure), and scenario-manifest.json (15 entries with requiredTestType / linkedTests / evidenceRefs; deferred status flag + deferredTo on rescoped scenarios).

Validated: artifact lint clean, artifact-freshness guard clean, no template placeholders, no TODO/FIXME/STUB in referenced implementation files. Pre-existing state-transition-guard blocking findings (G053 Code Diff Evidence, G056 certification block fields, G057 manifest fields, G022 specialist phases, regression-E2E + shared-infra + change-boundary DoD items, ALL DoD checked, ALL scopes Done) all addressed.

Audited rescope decision against framework rules: scope-workflow-runtime allows Done (annotation) when work is rescoped to follow-on spec with explicit rationale + rollback. Anti-fabrication policy honored: on-disk evidence (web/pwa/assistant.{html,js}, tests/e2e/assistant/web_pwa_*_test.go, tests/unit/clients/render_descriptor_canary_test.go, tests/fixtures/assistant_response_v1/, clients/mobile/assistant/lib/core/render_descriptor_v1.dart, internal/config/assistant_frontend.go) cited per DoD item. Live-stack drift for TP-073-05/08/09/10/11 documented under convergenceHealth.knownDrift with owner + evidenceRef (passed-with-known-drift policy).

Chaos coverage: adversarial sibling on TP-073-10 (different transport_message_ids must produce distinct assistant_turn_ids) proves the retry parity check fails loudly if regression reintroduces fresh-id-per-retry. Adversarial sibling on TP-073-02 codegen drift proves the schema drift detector itself is not tautological. No chaos injection harness regressions detected. Transitioning status to done under passed-with-known-drift policy with convergenceHealth.knownDrift documenting the queued live-stack runs.

MVP M2 dispatch (parent-expanded from bubbles.goal → bubbles.workflow improve-existing). Reopened spec 073 additively to add SCOPE-073-05 (Knowledge Graph Browse Surface / graph-browse-surface): web/PWA wiki routes for topics/people/places/time/artifact-detail, server-driven cross-link renderer, and inline annotation entry point delegating to spec 027 SCOPE-9 (SCN-027-71..74). Added six Gherkin scenarios SCN-073-B01..B06 to spec.md under new section '## Knowledge Graph Browse Surface'; added '## Graph Browse UI Architecture' to design.md (routes, data fetch, link rendering, annotation entry point, <1s LAN initial-paint performance budget, accessibility, reuse of existing PWA shell/auth/codegen foundations). Added Scope 5 to scopes.md with full UI matrix, implementation plan, consumer/shared-infra sweeps, change boundary, test plan (TP-073-25..31), and tiered DoD. Added six SCN-073-B01..B06 entries to scenario-manifest.json (status: planned; B06 dependsOn spec 027 SCOPE-9). Status reopened from done → specs_hardened under improve-existing ceiling; workflowMode improve-existing; planning-only (no code changes). Existing assistant-centric scopes 1-4 untouched. Next required owner: bubbles.implement after spec 027 SCOPE-9 lands; browse surface itself does not block on annotation endpoint (degrades to disabled affordance).

Scope 5 upstream API gap formally documented; 8 missing JSON endpoints routed to internal/knowledge/intelligence/graph owning specs. 073 ceiling specs_hardened upheld; Scope 5 stays Not started until backend ships. Endpoints: GET /api/topics, GET /api/topics/{id}, GET /api/people, GET /api/people/{id}, GET /api/places, GET /api/places/{id}, GET /api/time?from=&to=, GET /api/graph/edges?source={kind:id}. Verified by grep of internal/api/router.go — none exist today; only /topics server-rendered HTML (wrong shape). Added '## Scope 5 — Upstream Blocker (Route Required)' section to scopes.md between Test Plan and DoD; suffixed all 11 Scope 5 DoD items with '(BLOCKED on upstream API gap — see ## Scope 5 — Upstream Blocker)' — none checked. Filed bug packet at bugs/BUG-073-UPSTREAM-API-GAP/ (status: open, severity: blocker, owner: needs operator triage). Next required owner: null — operator triage required to assign the 8 endpoints to specific upstream spec(s).
Scope 5 unblocked: upstream specs 080 and 027 Scope 9 both done. DoD blocker suffixes removed; bug resolved; ceiling lifted specs_hardened → done. Scope 5 ready for bubbles.implement dispatch.

Scope 5 UX inherited from Scopes 1-2 PWA shell; no new UX surfaces designed. Web wiki routes reuse the existing embedded-PWA composer/transcript/live-region patterns and the same auth/storage guards established under Scopes 1-2. No bespoke UX research, mockups, or accessibility primitives produced for this spec; the wiki surface consumes the existing PWA shell unchanged.

Post-implementation spec freshness review for improve-existing workflow: spec.md (## Knowledge Graph Browse Surface), design.md (## Graph Browse UI Architecture), and scopes.md (Scope 5) all match shipped implementation under web/pwa/wiki*; SCN-073-B01..B06 trace from spec.md through DoD to e2e tests in tests/e2e/wiki/.
